creator: Kyle Smith
source_text:
🌯 CHICK-FIL-A BREAKFAST BURRITO MEAL PREP DUPE 🤤🔥

These might be the BEST breakfast meal prep I’ve made all year…

💬 Comment “TASTY” and I’ll DM you the full recipe!
📖 Comment “COOKBOOK” if you want my 233+ high-protein recipes that taste like cheat meals.

Each burrito:
🔥 496 Calories
💪 53g Protein

For comparison, a typical Chipotle chicken burrito is around:
🌯 1,100–1,200 Calories
💪 50–60g Protein

That means you could eat TWO of these for fewer calories than one Chipotle burrito… while getting almost double the protein. 🤯

These are loaded with spicy chicken, fluffy egg whites, crispy bacon, reduced-fat cheddar, all wrapped in a high-protein Carb Balance tortilla. They freeze great, reheat in minutes, and make hitting your protein goals ridiculously easy.

Who’s making these first? 👇🔥

expected.name: CHICK-FIL-A BREAKFAST BURRITO MEAL PREP DUPE

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output; the full recipe is externally gated and the prose component summary is not an ingredient section.
Accepted after comma-separated nutrition ranges were excluded from ingredient context.
